scheme_name: Medical Expenses – Treatment for Major Ailments Including Surgery
implementing_department: Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department
description: Financial assistance for registered construction workers or their dependents suffering from major diseases including cancer, heart, kidney and others.
benefits: Medical assistance up to ₹20,000 per annum
Up to ₹60,000 for surgeries like heart or kidney operations
eligibility: Registered construction worker under BOCW Welfare Board
Worker or dependent suffering from listed major ailments

steps: Register as a construction worker using Form-27
Submit application Form-XI for medical assistance
Submit documents to Assistant Labour Commissioner

additional_notes: Annual renewal of registration is mandatory.
